title: Granting access to S3 buckets to all or authenticated users is security sensitive
description: This rule identifies S3 bucket policy configurations that grant access to all or authenticated users, which can lead to unintended data exposure.
message: Unrestricted access to S3 bucket detected
recommendation: Restrict S3 bucket access to only necessary users or use bucket policies that follow the principle of least privilege

noncompliant.description: Allows all users to access the bucket

compliant.description: Allows a specific user to access the bucket

why_is_this_an_issue: Unrestricted access to S3 buckets can lead to unintended data exposure or unauthorized data access.
how_to_fix: Review and modify S3 bucket policies to restrict access to only necessary users or use bucket policies that follow the principle of least privilege.

metadata.title: Granting access to S3 buckets to all or authenticated users is security sensitive
